text.title: RAG Pipeline Design — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by query complexity + data-source count + latency envelope to Naive / Advanced / Modular / Agentic tier.

decision-tree.root-question: How many distinguishable intent classes does query sample show?

branch.question: How many heterogeneous data sources feed retrieval?
Does any intent require multi-step reasoning across passages?

conclusion.verdict: tier=modular — parallel retrieval across sources + reranker + merge

example.code: intent_count=3 → q-sources → data_sources=1 → q-multistep → multi_step=false → r2-hybrid-default verdict: tier=advanced
